notes: v0.16.86 — Mini-boss empty-arena ROOT CAUSE fix. The v0.16.85 diag strip cracked it: `Combatant.new() + set_script(MiniBossScript) + add_child` never fires MiniBoss._ready, leaving the boss as an empty shell at (0,0) with z_index=0 (drawn under the arena background → arena looks blank). Switched to direct construction via the class_name global (`boss = MiniBoss.new()`) so the full derived-class init chain runs and _ready fires on add_child. Spawn order corrected — kind is assigned BEFORE add_child so the kind-specific init (queen-drone build, _kind_color, archetype dispatch) runs from the first physics tick. Diag strip + console spawn log kept one release to verify; drop in v0.16.87 if no regression. Windows only.
